T0262.title: Bot Traffic
T0262.definition: Automated engagement farming refers to the use of automated scripts or physical devices to simulate human operations for the bulk creation of fake data metrics.
T0262.description: Through device farms, cloud phones, or custom software, operators perform bulk liking, viewing, or ordering actions on a specified target. Automated engagement farming can rapidly fabricate popularity and is used for e-commerce brushing, live stream view inflation, or app store rating manipulation. This behavior severely compromises platform data integrity and misleads consumer decisions, constituting a typical form of fraudulent marketing.
T0262.usageExample: Source: Large supply of US-region automated farming accounts with 1k followers, in stock.

references.title: 2024 H1 Internet Underground Economy Research Report
